entries.notes: Report schema writer tests land with report schema task, including internal_error run.error shape plus distinct backend_stability and operator_stability coverage.

Task 054 builds the zentinel.ai.prompt.v1 request envelope and validates it before any provider call: mutation flows (explain/suggest/review_tests) must embed a context whose schema_version is zentinel.ai.context.v1 and which passes the registered ai.context.v1 structural validator, every embedded command carries a failure_kind, a schema-version-only context placeholder is rejected (bad_context), and any other context schema is rejected (unknown_context_schema); the schema reserves the doctest flows/context for tasks 055 and 067.

Task 053 builds a schema-valid AI context and validates the nested mutant/result/source/test/operator object shapes: it rejects a context missing a required nested object or nested field, legacy single-command or test_command result payloads, empty argv[0], non-minimal environment policy, a shell command, and malformed skip reasons; it requires deterministic skip_reason for skipped command and result entries; it rejects preview as a backend stability while accepting it as an operator stability; and it enforces 4096 UTF-8 byte stdout/stderr excerpt bounds, capping excerpts on a safe character boundary (schema maxLength is the secondary structural guard).

Task 054 validates explain responses against the closed schema: it accepts both the mutation classifications and the shared doctest classifications (doctest_output_mismatch and the other four) that task 055 reuses without redefining the enum, and rejects unknown classifications, unknown confidence, an empty summary, any unknown field (including an attempt to set a result status), hidden tool instructions in advisory text, and malformed evidence_refs.

Task 054 validates suggest responses against the closed schema: one to three suggestions, each with a project-relative target_file, and rejects more than three suggestions, an absolute or parent-traversing target path, unknown classifications, unknown fields, and hidden tool instructions in suggestion text.

Task 054 validates review-tests responses against the closed schema: clusters group report survivors by classification with durable m_-prefixed mutant ids, and the validator rejects non-durable mutant ids (e.g. a display id), unknown classifications, unknown fields, and hidden tool instructions; the stub clusters only survived mutants from the selected report and never a killed one.

Doctest report schema: the CLI doctest command emits zentinel.doctest.report.v1 with the full run object (closed run.error for internal_error, required null otherwise), the 8-field summary, and cases carrying the exact case.kind enum, structured command, bounded result with exact snapshot evidence, diagnostics, and advisory.ai. A passing-report JSON snapshot, the deterministic semantic validator (summary derivation, case ordering, run/error cross-field rules), and invalid/internal_error cases are tested in test/doctest_cli_command_test.zig.

Task 055 creates and tests the non-survivor doctest AI context flows from docs/DOCTEST_AI_INTEGRATION.md; task 067 later extends the same schema with explain_doctest_survivor after task 061 stabilizes mutation-aware report fields.
Doctest AI suggestion response schema tests land with task 055 from the exact target in docs/DOCTEST_AI_INTEGRATION.md.
Doctest AI snapshot-review response schema tests land with task 055 from the exact target in docs/DOCTEST_AI_INTEGRATION.md.

Baseline pipeline handoff schema created (draft 2020-12) matching docs/HANDOFF_CONTRACTS.md: required schema_version/task_id/role/status/files_changed/tests_added/commands_executed/artifacts_produced/known_risks/assumptions/mutation_results/property_results/doctest_results/next_step_instructions, additionalProperties:false. Validated by a stdlib-only required-field/additionalProperties/const check over passing and field-removed fixtures.

Baseline active-lock schema created for artifacts/pipeline/<task-id>/locks/active-task-lock.json (docs/PIPELINE_ARTIFACTS.md): required schema_version/task_id/state/queue_order/queue_file/status_file/context_packet/created_by_role/source_commit/working_tree_state. Validated by the stdlib fixture check.

Task 041 created the baseline schema and a valid/invalid fixture pair (test/fixtures/pipeline/context/) for validator-backed context artifacts; the task-041 baseline deferral is superseded by the later refinement task tasks/042-context-packet-system.md, which fully covers role-specific context packet fields and fixtures without weakening the baseline schema.

Task 041 created the baseline schema and a valid/invalid fixture pair (test/fixtures/pipeline/stale_context/) for validator-backed stale-context artifacts; the task-041 baseline deferral is superseded by the later refinement task tasks/042-context-packet-system.md, which fully covers stale-context semantics and fixtures without weakening the baseline schema.

Task 041 created the baseline schema and a valid/invalid fixture pair (test/fixtures/pipeline/verification/) for validator-backed verification artifacts; the task-041 baseline deferral is superseded by the later refinement task tasks/046-verification-pipeline.md, which fully covers final verification fields and fixtures without weakening the baseline schema.

Task 041 created the baseline schema and a valid/invalid fixture pair (test/fixtures/pipeline/escalation/) for validator-backed escalation artifacts; the task-041 baseline deferral is superseded by the later refinement task tasks/049-pipeline-escalation.md, which fully covers escalation triggers, outcomes, and monotonic gate fixtures without weakening the baseline schema.
Queue JSON is validated by the task-system validator.
Status JSON is validated by the task-system validator, including clean_handoff_baseline source_commit and per-file sha256 checks.
